summary: Decent recording of a massive setlist that stands out as one of the better shows of the year.
review: The reviewers note a huge, well‑executed set that places this concert among the stronger performances of its year. No specific comments about the audio source are given, so the recording quality is unclear but appears listenable enough to support the positive musical impression.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 3‑star review; praise focuses on set size and overall performance, with no detail on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mentioned sound clarity, mix, or source type, so the technical quality cannot be assessed beyond being acceptable for listening.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a huge setlist that was well played and ranks among the better shows of the year.
